title: AZB, Freshfields advise Novartis AG on sale of Novartis India
description: Novartis AG has sold its entire shareholding of Novartis India Limited, representing 70.68% of the equity share capital, to WaveRise Investments Limited, ChrysCapital Fund X and Two Infinity Partners (which form part of the ChrysCapital group).AZB & Partners advised Novartis AG on this transaction.The transaction team consisted of Darshika Kothari (Senior Partner), Kritika Agarwal (Partner), Arnav Shah (Counsel), Associates Ashwin Vardarajan and Siddharth Tandon.
